overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a video game. The player follows a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees and vegetation, illuminated by a flashlight or torch, eventually approaching a rocky stone wall formation.

tall green grass and undergrowth lining the left side
tall green grass and undergrowth lining the right side

dense deciduous trees visible in the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing tall grass on both sides with dense trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest path with close tree trunks

events.description: path narrows and large tree trunk appears prominently on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as trees close in on both sides

entered.detail: thick tree trunk very close to the path edge on the right
fallen log or branch lying on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the camera moves forward, with a large tree trunk appearing very close on the right side. The surroundings become more enclosed with dense undergrowth replacing the grassy verge on the left, and a fallen log is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with stone wall formation

events.description: large stone wall formation becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching a rocky outcrop while following the illuminated path

entered.detail: large rocky stone wall or cliff face emerging from the darkness on the left

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rockier as the camera approaches a large stone wall formation on the left. The path continues through dense vegetation, with the large tree trunk now further back on the right. The flashlight illuminates the stone wall as it comes into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from an open dirt trail into a claustrophobic, rocky corridor. It begins with a walk along a narrow path illuminated by a flashlight, where tall grass lines the way and dense trees loom in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, with a large tree trunk and a fallen log crowding the right side while thick undergrowth replaces the grassy verge on the left. The scene then shifts as the terrain grows rockier, leading the camera through dense vegetation toward a looming stone wall formation. Finally, the flashlight beam sweeps across the rugged surface of the stone wall as it dominates the left side of the frame.
